message:
fix: make label matching case-insensitive in block-impact, recipe filters, and TUI

- label_intel.rs: replace direct string comparison with label_matches()
  in block-impact calculation; add test confirming case-insensitive
  blocking detection ("Backend" vs "backend")
- recipe.rs: switch recipe label filter from `==` to
  eq_ignore_ascii_case so applied recipes match labels regardless of
  casing
- tui.rs: use eq_ignore_ascii_case for modal label filter checks,
  label-detail issue listing, label-attention drill-down, and
  set_label_filter toggle; fix board detail scroll to use clamped
  offset preventing scroll past content end; add two tests for
  case-insensitive label filtering and toggle behaviour

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
